description: Charming 3-bedroom home nestled in a quiet Rock Hill neighborhood. Features an open-concept living space, updated kitchen, and a spacious backyard perfect for entertaining.
Stunning large-scale home offering incredible space and versatility. With 7 bedrooms and 4 baths across nearly 5,000 sq ft, this is ideal for large families or multi-generational living.

Sleek uptown Charlotte condo on the 10th floor. Enjoy stunning city views, an open kitchen with modern finishes, in-unit laundry, and access to building amenities — walkable to everything Uptown has to offer.
